zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud Raleigh於1270年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特內特萊可姆時，她的父親Warin de Raleigh16歲，母親Joanna le Boteler17歲。她於大約1284年與Sir Matthew Furneaux在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1331年之後在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特爾頓 康特洛。

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud Raleigh was born in 1270, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Warin de Raleigh, was 16 and her mother, Joanna le Boteler, was 17. She married Sir Matthew Furneaux about 1284, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died after 1331, in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé Sir Matthew Furneaux environ 1284, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée après 1331, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud Raleighが1270年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベで生まれた時，父Warin de Raleighは16歳，母Joanna le Botelerは17歳であった。約1284年にイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベでSir Matthew Furneauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1331年以後にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトチルトン カンテロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud Raleigh(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Warin de Raleigh(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna le Boteler(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1284년 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 Sir Matthew Furneaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1331년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 치턴 캉로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud Raleigh nasceu em 1270, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Warin de Raleigh, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Joanna le Boteler, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Matthew Furneaux aproximadamente 1284, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. ro.Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, England: Chilton Cantelo, Somerset, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud Raleigh родилась в 1270 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Warin de Raleigh было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna le Boteler, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Matthew Furneaux около 1284 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла после 1331 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности чилтон кантелоу, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
